name: skin-cuicui
title: Cuicui skin
description: Cuicui-inspired shell skin with fixed grain, a docked w-80 sidebar, a neutral main container, and the send-aurora anchored extension on ChatComposer (skin.config fills the chat-composer:send-layer anchor).
docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";
